title: GovernanceProposalStatusChangedEvent
description: Published when a governance proposal's status transitions. Consumed by the GraphQL `proposalStatusChanged` subscription (backend/src/graphql/resolvers.ts, SUBSCRIPTION_TOPICS.proposalStatusChanged).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this event type. Bump on breaking changes.

creatorAddress.description: Owning token's creator address, used for tenant scoping (TenantScopedPayload).
